name: Confit of Salmon with Roasted Shallots, Garlic and Red Wine
recipeIngredient: 400 grams duck or goose fat (14 oz)
250 milliliters fresh chicken stock (9 fl oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salmon fillets into thick steaks with skin on.
2. Gently poach the salmon in warm duck fat, salt, pepper, lemon slices, and thyme.
3. Place garlic bulbs and shallots whole in a roasting pan, drizzled with olive oil and season.
4. Roast in the oven until garlic and shallots are golden brown.
5. To make the sauce, heat butter in a pan and add chopped onions.
6. Add red wine and chicken stock, reducing until thickened.
7. Finish the sauce with additional butter, seasoning, and herbs.
8. Remove salmon from the pan and drain slightly.
9. Place salmon in center of plate.
10. Garnish with roasted garlic and shallots.
11. Serve sauce around edge of plate.
